puzzle.hint: The closing verse of Surah Al-Imran, commanding believers to practice patience, perseverance, steadfastness, and taqwa to attain true success.
puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱصْبِرُوا۟ وَصَابِرُوا۟ وَرَابِطُوا۟ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: O you who have believed, persevere and endure and remain stationed and fear Allāh that you may be successful.
